summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be substantially implemented. REQ-2 (voice search) is fully implemented via the useVoiceSearch hook and Layout.tsx changes. REQ-1 (richer search result cards) has a results count indicator, loading skeletons, and empty state, but the richer per-video card details (thumbnail, channel name, view count, upload date, duration) are delegated entirely to the existing VideoCard component without modifications.

missing_requirements.requirement: Search results page shows each video's thumbnail, title, channel name, view count, upload date, and duration
missing_requirements.reason: The SearchResultsPage delegates rendering to the existing VideoCard component without any modifications to it. The diff does not show VideoCard being updated to include all required fields. The file summary describes VideoCard as a reusable video card but does not confirm it displays all six required fields (thumbnail, title, channel name, view count, upload date, duration). No diff evidence confirms these fields are present.
